title: You Can't Always Get What You Want
why_this_song: You Can't Always Get What You Want by The Rolling Stones (1969) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: You can't always get what you want
You can't always get what you want
But if you try sometimes you find
I saw her today at the reception
A glass of wine in her hand
I knew she would meet her connection
At her feet was her footloose man

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "can't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "can't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "always" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "always" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I saw her today at the reception
I sung my song to Mr. Jimmy, yeah

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: A glass of wine in her hand
You can't always get what you want
You can't always get what you want, Lord

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "You Can't Always Get What You Want" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "You Can't Always Get What You Want", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "You Can't Always Get What You Want" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "You Can't Always Get What You Want" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "You Can't Always Get What You Want", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "You Can't Always Get What You Want", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.
